title: StreetLogic
tagline: Launch video for StreetLogic — an AI-powered smart dashcam for cyclists
description: Your extra set of eyes on the road
what:
Your extra set of eyes on the road

Streetlogic is a smart dashcam for bikes. It does more than just record 360 footage of everything around you -- it uses AI to warn you if cars are coming too close.

I love biking, and I love living in cities. But mixing the two can be dangerous. I made this video for Streetlogic's launch to help them spread the dream of safe urban cycling.
scraped_raw_text: Your extra set of eyes on the road
Streetlogic is a smart dashcam for bikes. It does more than just record 360 footage of everything around you -- it uses AI to warn you if cars are coming too close.
I love biking, and I love living in cities. But mixing the two can be dangerous. I made this video for Streetlogic's launch to help them spread the dream of safe urban cycling.
why: I love cycling in cities and the danger is real. StreetLogic needed to sell a dream as much as a product — safety on streets that are already hostile to cyclists.
